title: Design System: All Abode Property Solutions

display.purpose: Hero headlines only, one per page.

lead.purpose: Intro paragraph directly under a headline.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, micro-labels, button text, form field labels (label-caps).

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Content card hover state only, never at rest.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Floating surfaces: mobile nav drawer, dropdown panels, modals.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default exit/enter easing — exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: State transitions that both start and end at rest.

motion.name: dur-mid
motion.purpose: Button, card, and nav state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The workhorse solid-navy CTA used across the marketing site and portals.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--color-navy, #0a2540); color: #ffffff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0c2f52; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-focus, #0d518c); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Reserved for the single highest-priority CTA per page (e.g. "List Your Property"). Never a second gold button on the same screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--color-gold, oklch(69% 0.087 85)); color: var(--color-navy, #0a2540); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-gold:hover { background: var(--color-gold-bright, oklch(60% 0.10 85)); } .ds-btn-gold:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-focus, #0d518c); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Navy outline button for secondary actions on light surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-navy, #0a2540); border: 1px solid var(--color-navy, #0a2540); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-navy, #0a2540); color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-focus, #0d518c); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Property Card
components.description: Signature listing card: sharp corners, hairline border, hover-only shadow and image zoom, status pill and favorite button over the image band.
components.html:
Available

₱25,000/mo

2BR Condo, BGC

Taguig, Metro Manila
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--color-line, oklch(90% 0.006 250)); background: var(--color-surface, oklch(99.5% 0.002 95)); transition: box-shadow 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(10,37,64,0.04), 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(10,37,64,0.12); } .ds-card-image { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-navy, #0a2540), var(--color-navy-700, #0d518c)); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-status { position: absolute; left: 16px; top: 16px; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: #10b981; color: #ffffff; } .ds-card-fav { position: absolute; right: 16px; top: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background: rgba(10,37,64,0.7); color: #ffffff; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); cursor: pointer; } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; } .ds-card-price { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Inter Tight', sans-serif); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-navy-700, #0d518c); margin: 0; } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Inter Tight', sans-serif); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-navy, #0a2540); margin: 4px 0 0; } .ds-card-location { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-slate, #5b6573); margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with label-caps label, hairline default border, navy focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-ink, #16202c); } .ds-field-input { width: 100%; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--color-line-strong, oklch(82% 0.01 250)); background: var(--color-surface, oklch(99.5% 0.002 95)); color: var(--color-ink, #16202c); padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-slate-soft, oklch(58% 0.015 250)); } .ds-field-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-navy-700, #0d518c); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(13,81,140,0.15); }

components.name: Floating Nav Pill
components.description: Signature N5 Floating Pill navigation: fixed, rounded-2xl, backdrop-blur bar that shifts from cream/hairline (top of page) to navy/glass (scrolled).
components.html:
All Abode
LeasingBrokerageProperty Management
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 12px; z-index: 50; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-nav-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-line, oklch(90% 0.006 250)); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); padding: 10px 20px; transition: background 300ms, border-color 300ms; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Inter Tight', sans-serif); font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-navy, #0a2540); } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-ink, #16202c); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 8px 6px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--color-navy, #0a2540); } .ds-nav-cta { border-radius: 9999px; padding: 8px 20px; }

narrative.overview:
All Abode Navy is the anchor - the color that carries the site's weight and reads as stability and licensed credibility. Warm Brass is the one accent that marks the moments that matter: a primary CTA, an active state, a credential badge. It never carpets a page; its rarity is what makes it read as considered rather than decorative. Around that pairing sits generous whitespace, near-white surfaces, and sharp, architectural corners on the working surfaces (cards, inputs) - softened only where the system deliberately signals "interactive and premium" (the floating pill nav, pill-shaped CTAs). The voice is modern, warm, and professional: precise enough to read as a licensed operator, warm enough to invite a first-time property owner in.

This system explicitly rejects the generic, interchangeable real-estate-listing template (stock hero carousels, no distinct identity), the informal individual broker's Facebook-marketplace feel, and - on the portal/admin side specifically - the bolted-on corporate-SaaS-dashboard cliché (gradient hero-metric cards, disconnected visual language). Every surface, marketing or portal, is the same brand at the same register.
keyCharacteristics: Navy-anchored, brass-accented - one warm color, used sparingly and only with intent.
Sharp/architectural radius by default; rounded-full/2xl reserved for the floating nav and pill CTAs.
Flat-at-rest surfaces; shadow is a hover/lift response, never a resting-state default.
Single font lineage (Inter Tight + Inter) - genuinely distinct optical cuts, one loading footprint.
Dashboards and marketing share one token system; neither reads as a separate product.

rules.name: The Single-Accent Rule
rules.body: Warm Brass appears only on the highest-priority CTA, active/selected states, and credential emphasis - never as a background wash, never carpeted across a section.

rules.name: The Text-Safe Brass Rule
rules.body: Raw Warm Brass is for on-navy use only. On any light surface, brass text/icons/borders always use Warm Brass Ink instead.

rules.name: The Label-Caps Rule
rules.body: Every eyebrow, micro-label, button label, and form-field label uses the same label-caps treatment - uppercase, 0.12em tracking, 600 weight, 12px.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat (hairline border, no shadow) by default. Shadow is exclusively a hover or lift response, never a resting-state decoration.

rules.name: The Sharp-Unless-Floating Rule
rules.body: Corners are sharp (0-4px) on every working surface by default. rounded-full / rounded-2xl are reserved exclusively for the floating nav bar and pill-shaped CTAs.

dos: Do anchor every surface in All Abode Navy as the dominant brand color, with Warm Brass appearing only on the single highest-priority action or credential moment per screen.
Do keep corners sharp (0-4px radius) on cards, inputs, and panels - reserve rounded-full / rounded-2xl exclusively for the floating nav and pill CTAs.
Do keep every surface flat-at-rest; introduce shadow only as a hover or lift response.
Do use Warm Brass Ink, never raw Warm Brass, for brass text/icons/borders on any light background.
Do apply the same label-caps treatment to every eyebrow, button label, and form-field label.
Do keep dashboards and portals on the same navy/brass/sharp-corner system as the marketing site.
donts: Don't let any page read as a generic, interchangeable real-estate-listing template - no stock hero carousels, no templated look with no distinct identity.
Don't let any surface read like an informal individual broker's Facebook-marketplace page.
Don't bolt a generic corporate-SaaS-dashboard look onto the portal/admin side - no gradient hero-metric cards, no visual language that breaks from the marketing brand.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe anywhere in the system.
Don't use gradient text for emphasis; emphasis comes from weight, size, or the Label role.
Don't let Warm Brass carry more than one element's fill on a given screen.
